TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mike_Bloom, title = Mike_Bloom, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Bloom} }

S.FORM: Mike Bloomsraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 1, Mike Bloom, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mike Bloomsraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1915 , ryax sa tay 14 nqu tay 1, Mike Bloom, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1993) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mike βlooms~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mike βloom, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
